work_unit: Q02 terminal-slot contamination guard and requeue
diversity_rationale: Market-neutral FX basket on AUDUSD.DWX/EURJPY.DWX with EURUSD.DWX and USDJPY.DWX conversion history; no healthy Q02 path existed.

diagnosis.root_cause: Terminal-slot contamination: 7f04ff6a tester.ini requested QM5_12778 on AUDUSD.DWX, but the copied tester log contains QM5_12786 on USDCHF.DWX and an empty M0/1970 report.
diagnosis.history_check: AUDUSD.DWX, EURJPY.DWX, EURUSD.DWX, and USDJPY.DWX history exists on T1-T10 for the required Q02 window.

fix.summary: Test-TerminalAlreadyRunning now treats Win32_Process.ExecutablePath as authoritative and falls back to command-line/root matching, preventing a dedicated terminal launch from being mistaken as idle when CommandLine is blank or stale.
